reviews.review_description: Well, for $2.13 this is a steal. The concept is good. The theme is good. The font of the letters is HORRIBLE. Cannot really read the letters without starring at them. I gave a 4 because of front. Overall i will recommend to others.

I didn't know what to expect from this game but I purchased it because it was in the sale it's absolutely brilliant the different scenarios for each person is an excellent idea I didn't realize that was in it.

Definitely worth your pennies and it's cheaper than a fast food milkshake unless you purchased the small milkshake but who purchases small milkshakes?

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review — I’m really glad you enjoyed it! I’m hoping to get back to the game with some updates once I finish my current project and make it even better.

And yes… large milkshakes all the way!

reviews.review_description: There are four sets you can choose from.  Pick your word difficulty, and start choosing your letters.  Great graphics and animations.  Says the game is rated MA.  Well, BS.  I’d say it should be rated 10+.  Nothing scary.  Music is suspenseful.  It’s a good game to waste about thirty minutes on, then it gets old.  Maybe updates with more words, or even add phrases.  4/5 stars.
The concept is really cool. The implementation isn't. I don't like font. The interaction doesn't feel right when hitting buttons and menus. The game is fun if you can ignore the jank.

reviews.review_title: Funny game but has major glitch
reviews.review_description: Too bad. This game is entertaining and funny but the keyboard and letters don't reset after you guess each word. The letters get blacked out after you use them for the first word so you cannot use them again on the next word. You have close the game and go back in after every word to reset it. Im asking for a refund.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for bringing this to our attention! We’ve fixed the issue so the keyboard now resets properly between games. We really appreciate your feedback and hope you’ll give the game another try!

reviews.review_description:
Well I really enjoyed this fun game
With a very classic theme.
I was thinking it would be nice to have maybe a selection of fonts as it not the easiest of font to read,
And maybe give each character three or four ways to die like for instance. 

Say when you get to a certain score  for example 
the pirate could be walking the plank  or the witch being dunked on a ducking stall/chair And so on...?
I really hope you stay with it a classic game with a V R pitch just 
Needs some more meat on the bones ( if your excuse the pun)
One  thing  I would like to see is what happens when you avoid being hung I would like what follows to last longer where a click of the mouse stops it .
As its nice to bask 😄 in your glory of winning. 
I really enjoyed it and hope you guys built it up and open it up
Great stuff !!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words — it really means a lot! You've shared some fantastic ideas, and we love how much thought you’ve put into it.

We totally agree about the font — making things more accessible is definitely on our to-do list, and we’re looking into having a unique "board" style for each level too, which should help give the game even more personality.

And you're absolutely right — adding more ways for each character to meet their doom is such a fun idea. We’ve got some plans brewing, and without giving too much away… let’s just say Halloween might bring some spooky surprises and new game modes. 🎃👀

Stay tuned, and thanks again for taking the time to play and share your thoughts. It really encourages us to keep building!
